summary: Frontend-only validation of the Design Requests 'Choose this design' rename + workflow guard (approved_versions:not_empty) on the nyla-air-water tenant. All three feature checkpoints pass end-to-end: version-card labels, in_review guard enforcement, and the workflow-builder checkbox.

workflow_builder.guard_summary_badge_visible: Blocked unless: Approved work versions has any (shown on both Internal Approve and Final Approve rows)
workflow_builder.save_persistence: Toast 'Saved ✔' shown; page returned to SM list on save

in_review_enforcement.internal_approve_tooltip_before_choose: Choose a work version before this action.
in_review_enforcement.state_after_forced_click_without_choose: In Review (unchanged — guard held server-side and client-side)

critical_code_review_comments: DesignRequestNewDetail render throws a React key warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop.' This is not a blocker but should be fixed by adding stable keys in one of the .map(...) blocks in DesignRequestNewDetail.js.
Login response returns 'session_token' (not 'access_token'/'token') — worth noting for the pytest template in guidelines but functionally correct.
seed_data_creation: Used existing In-Progress request MR-2026-0006 (id 537081ec-e022-4d26-a39c-25045cf2e6ee). Added one work version V1 with link 'https://example.com/design-v1' and comment 'v1 test comment'. Drove the state: In Progress -> In Review -> Approved (Internal). The version is currently marked as Chosen (approved_versions=[V1]). State was NOT reverted (no reverse transition exists back to In Progress without changes). If required, a subsequent 'Request Revisions' action can bring it back to In Progress.
context_for_next_testing_agent: State-machine builder: transitions on 'Design Requests - New Lifecycle (default)' expose expand toggles via data-testid transition-options-<idx>. The require-chosen-version checkbox uses data-testid txn-require-chosen-version-<idx>. For the DRN seed the idx are 5=Internal Approve (approve, in_review->approved_internal) and 7=Final Approve (final_approve, approved_internal->final_approved), both pre-checked. Guard summary chip 'Blocked unless: Approved work versions has any' appears under those two rows via data-testid guard-summary-<idx>. On the request detail page, action buttons use data-testid action-<action_key>-btn; guard-blocked buttons stay in the allowedTransitions list but are disabled with the block reason as tooltip. Toaster is Sonner — toasts are inside .Toaster > *.
